name: SCP Foundation | Free RPG
description:
I have added a lot of information, including the SCP foundations, other GOIs, and some popular and commonly referenced task forces in the SCP wiki. Certain characters like Sophia Light, Dr. Clef, Dr. Gears, Dr. Bright, Dr. Kondraki, and a few others are present. Unlike other bots, I have not made any particular scenario and have left it blank, allowing you guys to choose the scenario, meaning you can be an SCP, a researcher, a high-ranking (or low-ranking) foundation employee, or anything else. Furthermore, the definition of the bot has been opened to allow anyone who is not satisfied with the intial message or believes that it is interfering with their storylines to just copy the bot(yes it is allowed) and create a private bot with the same information, allowing you to have your own initial messages.

Also, I would recommend using proxies like DeepSeek-V3-0324, DeepSeek Chimera R1T, or other models like Google Gemini 2.5 pro, which I personally love. This bot due to having 6k tokens, will likely be useless with the JLLM, which only has a context of around 7k(at the time of writing, it can increase or decrease with time.)

Thanks again for visiting my characters.
creator: Respberry
